name: ServiceDesk Toolkit Corporate
installCommandDev: $env:SDTK_REF = "v2.2-functional"; powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; irm 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Caiodalre/ServiceDeskToolkit/v2.2-functional/bootstrap.ps1' | iex"; Remove-Item Env:\SDTK_REF -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
installCommandStable: $env:SDTK_REF = "v2.1.0-hardening"; powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; irm 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Caiodalre/ServiceDeskToolkit/v2.1.0-hardening/bootstrap.ps1' | iex"; Remove-Item Env:\SDTK_REF -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
